focus: security - Target 2 severity-resolution regression check for generated-metadata-integrity and flag wiring

findingDetails.title: MCP validation orchestrator ignores the explicit status-completion enforcement flag
findingDetails.claim: SPECKIT_STATUS_COMPLETION_CONSISTENCY_GATE=true is not wired through the MCP validation orchestrator path, so STATUS_COMPLETE_EVIDENCE_MISMATCH remains non-blocking there even when explicitly enforced.
findingDetails.counterevidenceSought: Confirmed validate.sh bridge passes the flag; searched call sites and found orchestrator validateFolder path omits it.
findingDetails.alternativeExplanation: If orchestrator is deprecated/unreachable, impact downgrades to parity cleanup.
findingDetails.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if maintainers confirm orchestrator validation is not a supported entrypoint.

traceabilityChecks.spec_code: CONDITIONAL: resolver split is correct, orchestrator wiring incomplete
traceabilityChecks.skill_agent: PASS: deep-review loaded and review_core read

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: targeted validator severity-resolution and rollout-flag wiring audit across producer, resolver, and caller surfaces

targetSelection.selectionReason: direct target files plus exact-search caller surfaces for resolveGeneratedMetadataIntegrity and isStatusCompletionConsistencyGateEnabled

searchLedger.invariant: Only STATUS_COMPLETE_EVIDENCE_MISMATCH may use the new per-code enforcement flag; all other codes must remain governed by !opts.grandfather.

searchActions.result: seven legacy codes fall through to !opts.grandfather because only STATUS_COMPLETE_EVIDENCE_MISMATCH is special-cased

searchLedger.rationale: producer lines emit the legacy codes, and resolver fallback remains blanket grandfather behavior
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: verified by direct read of producer and resolver branches

searchLedger.hypothesis: an entrypoint may fail to pass SPECKIT_STATUS_COMPLETION_CONSISTENCY_GATE into the resolver

searchActions.result: CLI bridge passes the flag; MCP orchestrator omits it

searchLedger.rationale: orchestrator entrypoint calls resolver without statusCompletionConsistencyEnforced, causing default false behavior even under explicit opt-in

title: MCP validation orchestrator ignores the explicit status-completion enforcement flag

detail: Seven legacy violation codes remain governed only by !opts.grandfather; only STATUS_COMPLETE_EVIDENCE_MISMATCH is special-cased by statusCompletionConsistencyEnforced.
